positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for beethoven_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for beethoven_pos.tptp
1. music_piece(symphony_no_9) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0,X1] : ((wrote(X0,X1) & music_piece(X1)) => composer(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. wrote(beethoven,symphony_no_9) [input(axiom)]
9. composer(beethoven) [input(conjecture)]
10. ~composer(beethoven) [negated conjecture 9]
11. ~composer(beethoven) [flattening 10]
16. ! [X0,X1] : (composer(X0) | (~wrote(X0,X1) | ~music_piece(X1))) [ennf transformation 2]
17. ! [X0,X1] : (composer(X0) | ~wrote(X0,X1) | ~music_piece(X1)) [flattening 16]
18. music_piece(symphony_no_9) [cnf transformation 1]
19. ~wrote(X0,X1) | composer(X0) | ~music_piece(X1) [cnf transformation 17]
20. wrote(beethoven,symphony_no_9) [cnf transformation 3]
24. ~composer(beethoven) [cnf transformation 11]
25. composer(beethoven) | ~music_piece(symphony_no_9) [resolution 19,20]
26. ~music_piece(symphony_no_9) [forward subsumption resolution 25,24]
27. $false [forward subsumption resolution 26,18]
% SZS output end Proof for beethoven_pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for beethoven_neg.tptp

cnf(u20,axiom,
    symphony_no_9 != vienna_music_society).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    symphony_no_9 != beethoven).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    beethoven != vienna_music_society).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define music_piece(X0) := $true
for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,
